summary: v292 proves that boundedHomotopyExactWeakEquivalence and its opposite contain identities without an exactAcyclicHomotopyObject iso-closedness input. This helps any homotopy/Verdier-class reformulation, but the direct W266 boundedExactWeakEquivalence identity input still needs direct mapping-cone identity exactness or a checked replacement assembly.

Dbounded finite limits: WalkingParallelPair functor-category localization now reduces to two fixed-target universal properties after objectwise inversion.
Dbounded finite products: exact-acyclic iso-closure collapse is reduced to exactAcyclic transport along HomotopyEquiv; the transport theorem remains missing.

Dbounded finite products: direct left calculus is reduced to exact-acyclic iso-closure collapse plus bounded homotopy inverse-image calculus transfer.
Dbounded finite limits: equalizer consumer is formalized; remaining first API is WalkingParallelPair functor-category localization plus parallel-pair weak-equivalence stability.
